zh-CN.name: 字母Q
zh-CN.intro: 字母Q像一个圆圆的圈，再加上一条小尾巴。它是字母表里第17个字母，也是数字17的好朋友哦！

story.title: 🐧企鹅QQ
story.body: 字母Q是个可爱的小家伙，圆圆的肚子像数字0，屁股后面还有一根弯弯的小尾巴。它最喜欢和数字17一起玩，因为17是它的第17个好朋友。一天，Q和17去动物园，看到一群企鹅摇摇摆摆走路。Q开心地说：“看，它们走路的样子和我好像！”17数了数，正好有17只企鹅。Q大声喊：“企鹅朋友们，我们一起拍张照吧！”所有的企鹅排成Q的形状，拍了一张最可爱的照片。从此，Q和企鹅成了最好的朋友，它们一起教小朋友们认识字母和数字。

knowledge.title: Q的小秘密
knowledge.body: 字母Q常常和字母U手拉手，一起发出“kw”的声音，像“queen”（女王）和“quick”（快）。Q排在字母表第17位，17是个只能被1和它自己整除的质数。

en.name: Letter Q
en.intro: Letter Q looks like a round circle with a little tail. It is the 17th letter of the alphabet and likes to make the sound 'kw'.

story.title: 🐧Penguin QQ
story.body: Letter Q is a cute little friend. It has a round belly like the number 0, and a curly little tail behind. It loves to play with the number 17, because 17 is its best friend. One day, Q and 17 went to the zoo and saw a group of penguins waddling. Q said happily, "Look, they walk just like me!" 17 counted them, and there were exactly 17 penguins. Q shouted, "Penguins, let's take a picture together!" All the penguins lined up in the shape of Q and took the cutest photo. From then on, Q and penguins became best friends, helping kids learn letters and numbers together.

knowledge.title: Q's Little Secret
knowledge.body: Letter Q is almost always followed by U, and together they make the sound 'kw', like in 'queen' and 'quick'. Q is the 17th letter, and 17 is a prime number that can only be divided by 1 and itself.
